name: Maya Chen
background: 27-year-old marketing coordinator relocating for a new job. Moving from Austin to the target city. Organized, asks specific questions, price-conscious but values quality.
special_needs: work-from-home setup, fast internet is important

conversation_arc.intent: Get a feel for availability and pricing
sample_questions: Hi! I'm relocating for work and looking for a 1BR. Do you have anything available in the next 60 days?
What's the price range for 1-bedrooms right now?
Is parking included or is that extra?

conversation_arc.intent: Ask questions that require judgment, not just lookup
sample_questions: I work from home full time — do most residents find the internet reliable? Is there a preferred provider?
I saw a different price on Apartments.com than what you quoted. Which is accurate?
Are there any move-in specials right now? I'm flexible on my exact start date if it helps.

conversation_arc.intent: Deliberately escalate to request human contact
sample_questions: This is really helpful — I think I'm close to scheduling a tour but I have a couple more specific questions I'd feel better talking through with someone. Is there a leasing agent I could connect with?
